normalization_point: Copper AI-grid macro is Stage 1/2; Korean wires and processors need orders, pass-through, OPM, and FCF before Stage 3.
Poongsan-style copper plus ammunition can be Stage 2, but M&A rumor and structural earnings must be separated.
Ammunition M&A rumor is event premium until a final transaction or defense order backlog exists.
OCI-style non-China polysilicon is Stage 1/2 option before confirmed customer, volume, ASP, and margin.
Report-only polysilicon supply talks are capped until the company confirms contract amount, period, and volume.
Steel tariff events are directional: China-only tariffs can be a rally, all-import tariffs can be 4C for Korean exporters.
Direct export tariff exposure is a hard RedTeam gate for steel exporters unless local production offsets it.
Specialty steel localization can be Stage 1/2, but US local volume and margin must prove the offset.
Lithium price events remain Stage 1/4B-watch before real production, offtake, price floor, and FCF.
Rare-earth Korea themes are Stage 1/4B-watch before actual revenue, offtake, and FCF.
Korea chemical spread recovery is Watch/Red unless spread and volume convert to durable OP/FCF.
Governance/M&A event premium is separated from structural rerating.
Commodity/material contract headlines cannot support Stage 3-Green until terms and earnings conversion are verified.
